economia.question_pt: Qual deve ser a prioridade na politica economica do governo federal?
economia.question_en: What should be the federal government's top economic policy priority?

options.text_pt: O governo o candidato reduziu impostos sobre o diesel (zeragem de PIS/Cofins) e concedeu subvenção de R$ 0,32 por litro, totalizando R$ 0,64 de redução no preço até dezembro de 2026, com custo fiscal de R$ 30 bilhões, como medida para conter a alta dos preços do combustível diante da escalada do petróleo internacional, em ano eleitoral, justificando a decisão como necessária para proteger a economia em momento de volatilidade internacional.
options.text_en: The the candidate government reduced taxes on diesel (zeroing PIS/Cofins) and granted a subsidy of R$ 0.32 per liter, totaling R$ 0.64 reduction in diesel price until December 2026, with a fiscal cost of R$ 30 billion, as a measure to contain fuel price increases amid rising international oil prices, in an election year, justifying the decision as necessary to protect the economy during international volatility.

options.text_en: Romeu the candidate supported the filing of an impeachment request against Supreme Court Justice Alexandre de Moraes, based on revelations of messages between Moraes and banker Daniel Vorcaro, which the party views as evidence of abuse in the Master Case, constituting a crime of responsibility that threatens the independence of democratic institutions.

options.text_en: the candidate banned the entry of Darren Beattie, advisor to Donald Trump, into Brazil while the visas of Health Minister Alexandre Padilha and his family remain blocked by the United States, stating the measure will only be reversed when the visas are released.

options.text_pt: O governo de o candidato de Freitas afirma que a criação da Tabela SUS Paulista, em 2023, levou a um aumento de 30% nas cirurgias de mama em São Paulo em 2025, passando de 2.881 em 2022 para 3.759 em 2025, devido à correção da defasagem dos repasses federais e ao aumento dos valores dos procedimentos, com R$ 9 milhões repassados a hospitais filantrópicos e Santas Casas.
options.text_en: The government of the candidate de Freitas claims that the creation of the Paulista SUS Table in 2023 led to a 30% increase in breast cancer surgeries in São Paulo in 2025, rising from 2,881 in 2022 to 3,759 in 2025, due to correcting federal reimbursement shortfalls and increasing procedure values, with R$9 million transferred to philanthropic hospitals and Santa Casas.
